description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The structure features a flat green roof, likely designed for sustainability and insulation, with a rooftop garden visible from above. The front of the bungalow opens onto a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a swimming pool, creating a luxurious and inviting outdoor living space. Large glass windows and sliding doors are present, maximizing natural light and offering seamless indoor-outdoor connectivity. The building's exterior is composed of a mix of concrete, wood paneling, and glass, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall layout is open and expansive, with landscaped lawns and pathways integrated into the design.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof, surrounded by trees, featuring a pool, patio, and large glass windows. The design emphasizes open, luxurious living with strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patio, pool, and main entrance, framed by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green roof, open lawn, and partial pool visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the green roof and back garden, less emphasis on the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green roof, patio, and more of the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels and sliding doors
